## Release Checkpoint: 2026-02-19 (v11.7 tuned)

- status: promoted and enforced (`PROMOTED_V11_7_TUNED`)
- activation: `make daily-check-enforce-v11-7`
- smoke status: `PASS`

### Promotion comparison (hedge-aware, with overrides)

| profile | terminal_wealth | sharpe | maxdd |
| --- | ---: | ---: | ---: |
| v11_6_tuned | 32.525377 | 1.098449 | -0.265694 |
| v11_7_tuned | 32.948060 | 1.101703 | -0.267355 |

### Investigation conclusion (v11.7)

- Original v11.7 underperformance was due to search-grid exclusion of v11.6 sweet-spot coordinates.
- Targeted rerun (`v11_7b_local_wealth_refine_run1`) reintroduced those coordinates and produced a superior candidate.
- Canonical v11.7 tuned artifacts were updated from v11.7b outputs.

### Active artifacts

- profile: reports/v11_7_tuned_profile.json
- overrides: reports/v11_7_tuned_overrides.csv
- scan evidence: reports/v11_7b_local_wealth_refine_run1_scan.csv
- dashboard: reports/promotion_dashboard_summary.csv
- smoke: reports/active_profile_smoke.csv

### Rollback

- quick rollback to v11.6: `make rollback-v11-6-from-v11-7-verify`
